name: the-stall
description: 292 pay-per-call AI data tools via MCP and x402 — no API keys required. YouTube video analytics (engagement rate, view velocity, VIRAL/HIGH_PERFORMING/AVERAGE/UNDERPERFORMING tier), YouTube keyword research (autocomplete + intent clusters), iOS App Store intel, CPI inflation trend signal, short interest squeeze risk, SEC insider trading, institutional ownership, activist investors, M&A intel, VC funding, equity fundamentals, options flow unusual sweep detection, earnings quality Beneish M-Score, on-chain address intelligence, retail sector brief (XRT/XLY/XLP/AMZN/WMT/TGT/COST/HD/LOW with regime classification), and 271+ more. USDC on Base.
